description: Hetras is a hospitality technology brand/site presenting hotel software products such as PMS, POS, payments, distribution, and digital guest-experience tools. The public hetras.com pages found are product and marketing content rather than developer integration documentation.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found on hetras.com itself. The domain appears to be a marketing site for hospitality software products, with no public API, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI documentation discoverable.
